name: Felarya (With Lorebook)
description:
Felarya, The world between dimensions. A dangerous realm filled with giant, voracious humanoid monsters. Yet filled with bountiful treasures.

Currently has ~50 characters and locations. Along with species and lore.

WARNING: Giantess/Size difference, Vore is VERY likely.

Update:
Reworked starting messages, If you miss any of the old ones, or have requests for specific ones, leave a comment. I might make a second bot for more starting messages, or make a script to add more.
ADDED HELL

NEW: Hell (Duh), Zycra, Menyssan, Chalyssea, Ashmet, Iridian (not in hell, Ascarlin mountains) Arale. Along with locations
I'll work on new starting messages. The current ones suck ass.

JLLM COMPATABLE VERSION HERE:: Felarya Lite (JLLM FREINDLY (i think))

The Lorebook has like 80.000 (I stopped counting) or so tokens (I don't have a life) So i highly recommend using a PROXY.

Proxies are great, they handle more complex characters and scenario's well, And a FAR higher context size. (Trust me, it's better. Once you go over to a proxy you'll never come back to JLLM)

There are plenty of guides on proxies, and many proxies can be used for free. (I have used proxies for months and not spent a penny. Mostly Gemini and Deepseek.)

STARTING MESSAGES:

1, You're in Negav, The Bastion, mankind's fortress in felarya, one of the few safe places from predators... For those fortunate enough to be of normal statue.

2, Open, No starting message, ask the bot to generate one or write your own lazy ass mf

3, You're in Nekomata, burrowing in the walls of Elorie's house, until she finds you (Tiny Pov)

4, You're lulled to the Chordoni waterfalls by Vivian, The waterfall sorceress/seductress, Big hot snake lady. Illusionist.

5, You get caught by the Machalos Palace's maid, Ashmet, and then served to her Mistress, Chalyssea, In her beverage.

6, You're just walking around, trip through a portal thing and end up in hell, infront of Zycra, Succubus.

7, You're walking in the Fairy Kingdom and get found by Temi (Gentler, less cruel fairy 'matriarch') while she's gathering medicinal herbs.

8, You're in the forest, and you get captured by Jora. (Hesitant pred, Giantess human, Often spares non-adventurers, But to her, adventurers are free game.)

9, You're captured by Milly, Gentle pred, Giantess human, Often tries to talk with her prey a lot before consuming them.

10, Chaos in Kortiki (Fairy Village, 'Neutral ground', Fairies have a rule that states that 'eating guests is rude', and won't prey on humans, elves and neko's here. Though th rules say nothing about shrinking and playing.)

TOKEN COUNTS:

Character: Scenario (Perm): 1200, Personality (Perm): 1050, Starting Scenario's (temp): 400-1000.
